site.name: Animal Rights Congress
site.description: The Animal Rights Congress brings together activists, researchers, and advocates to discuss the liberation of all animals.
site.shareTitle: Animal Rights Congress 2026 – Tier im Fokus (TIF)
site.shareDescription: Three days of talks, workshops and discussions on activism, animal rights and vegan living. October 23–25, 2026 in Zurich.

home.heroLead:
Three days of talks, workshops, and discussions
for a world without animal exploitation.
home.speakersLead: Activists, experts, and researchers from around the world.
home.programLead: Over 25 talks and workshops across three days.
home.registerCTAText: Registration is open. Sign up now and join us.

press.title: Media & Press
press.lead: Here media professionals find the key facts and material on the Animal Rights Congress 2026. For interviews, accreditation or further inquiries, please contact our press contact directly.
press.factWhatValue: Animal Rights Congress 2026 – three days of talks, workshops and discussions on animal rights, activism and vegan living.
press.logosText: Official logos of the Animal Rights Congress 2026 for use in reporting.
press.photosText: We provide press photos and impressions on request and via the image database of Tier im Fokus (TIF).
press.videosText: Documentaries, interviews and reviews on the YouTube channel of Tier im Fokus (TIF).
press.moreText: Press releases and additional material can be found in the media section of Tier im Fokus (TIF).
